data.title: Gold Surges Past $2,700 To Record High; Asia And Europe Markets In Green - Global Markets Today While US Slept
data.description: US markets mixed on 10/17, Dow at record high on strong retail sales and upbeat earnings from Taiwan Semiconductor. Gold surged on election uncertainty.

data.title: Hedge Fund Billionaire Daniel Loeb Bets On Trump Win, Singles Out This Recent Buy As Having 'Significant Upside Potential'
data.description: Hedge fund manager Daniel Loeb is optimistic about the economy and market and he sees Trump likely retaking White House.

data.title: Why Are Alibaba, Nio, JD.Com And Other US-Listed Chinese Stocks Surging Today?
data.description: China's GDP grew surpassing expectations though slightly below the 4.7% growth in the previous quarter.

data.title: Trick Or Treat: Rivian Rolls Out Spooky Halloween Update Featuring Car Costumes, Creepy Chirps
data.description: Rivian announced a Halloween software update with spooky features and car costumes, including a Knight Rider-inspired option.

data.title: Riding Dogecoin's Wave: Indicators Point To What Could Happen Next
data.description: Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has rallied handsomely this week, but as the “King of memes coins” gains momentum, the next question on traders’ minds is whether it would be able to sustain the spike.
